7 #include "ZoneModelMngService.h"
8 /* Author : havep at Tue Apr 15 16:20:56 2008

12 #include <arcane/utils/NotImplementedException.h>
13 using namespace Arcane;
14 
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
17 
18 class ModelEnumeratorImpl : public IZoneModelMng::IModelEnumeratorImpl {
19 private:
20  typedef ZoneModelMngService::ModelZoneMap ModelZoneMap;
21 public:
22  ModelEnumeratorImpl(ModelZoneMap & modelZoneMap)
23  : m_model_zone_map(modelZoneMap) { m_iter = m_model_zone_map.begin(); }
24  bool hasNext() { return m_iter != m_model_zone_map.end(); }
25  void moveNext() { ++m_iter; }
26  Integer count() { return m_model_zone_map.size(); }
27  IZoneModel * model() { return m_iter->first; }
28  ItemGroupCollection itemGroups() { return m_iter->second; }
29 private:
30  ModelZoneMap & m_model_zone_map;
31  ModelZoneMap::iterator m_iter;
32 };
33 
34 class ModelTypeEnumeratorImpl : public IZoneModelMng::IModelTypeEnumeratorImpl {
35 private:
36  typedef ZoneModelMngService::ModelMap ModelMap;
37  typedef IZoneModelMng::ModelEnumerator ModelEnumerator;
38 public:
39  ModelTypeEnumeratorImpl(ModelMap & modelMap)
40  : m_model_map(modelMap)
41  {
42  m_iter = m_model_map.begin();
43  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_iter->first==IZoneModel::ModelType()),("Corrupted data structure: default null string not found"));
44  moveNext();
45  }
46  bool hasNext() { return m_iter != m_model_map.end(); }
47  void moveNext() { ++m_iter; }
48  Integer count() { return m_model_map.size()-1; }
49  IZoneModel::ModelType modelType() { return m_iter->first; }
50  ModelEnumerator models() { return new ModelEnumeratorImpl(m_iter->second); }
51 private:
52  ModelMap & m_model_map;
53  ModelMap::iterator m_iter;
54 };
55 
56 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
57 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
58 
59 void
60 ZoneModelMngService::
61 init()
62 {
63  if (m_initialized) return;
64 
65  m_initialized = true;
66 
67  const Integer nbModel = options()->modelZone.size();
68  info() << "Initializing ZoneModelMngService with " << nbModel;
69  for(Integer imodel=0; imodel < nbModel; ++imodel)
70  {
71  const CaseOptionsZoneModelMng::CaseOptionModelZoneValue & modelZone = options()->modelZone[imodel];
72  IZoneModel * model = modelZone.model();
73  // info() <<" geo model[ "<<imodel<<"]= "<<model;
74  model->init();
75  const Arcane::CaseOptionMultiExtendedT<ItemGroup> & areas = modelZone.area;
76  const Integer nbArea = areas.size();
77  info() << "Nb Area : " << nbArea;
78  if (nbArea>0)
79  {
80  for(Integer iarea=0;iarea<nbArea;++iarea)
81  {
82  addModelZone(areas[iarea],model);
83  // info() << "geo groupe :"<<areas[iarea].name();
84  }
85  }
86  else
87  {
88  addModelZone(ItemGroup(),model);
89  }
90  }
91 
92  // Add no name ModelType for default empty ModelMapZone
93  m_models[IZoneModel::ModelType()];
94 }
95 
96 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
97 
98 void
99 ZoneModelMngService::
100 addModelZone(ItemGroup group, IZoneModel * model)
101 {
102  info() << "ZoneModelMngService::add " << group.name() << " " << model << " " << model->modelType();
103 
104  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_initialized),("Service used without initialization"));
105  ARCANE_ASSERT((model->modelType() != IZoneModel::ModelType()),("Null model type name not allowed"));
106  m_models[model->modelType()][model].add(group);
107 }
108 
109 bool
110 ZoneModelMngService::
111 removeModelZone(ItemGroup group, IZoneModel * model)
112 {
113  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_initialized),("Service used without initialization"));
114 // IZoneModel::ModelType modelType = model->modelType();
115 // ModelMap::iterator iModelZone = m_models.find(modelType);
116 // if (iModelZone == m_models.end()) return false;
117 // ModelZoneMap::iterator iModel = iModelZone->second.find(model);
118 
119 // Array<ModelZone<IZoneModel> > & modelArray = imodelArray->second;
120 
121 // // Remove ONE instance of this (group,model)
122 // for(Integer i=0;i<modelArray.size();++i)
123 // {
124 // ModelZone<IZoneModel> & modelZone = modelArray[i];
125 // if (modelZone.model() == model and modelZone.itemGroup() == group)
126 // {
127 // modelArray.remove(i);
128 // return true;
129 // }
130 // }
131  throw NotImplementedException(A_FUNCINFO);
132  return false;
133 }
134 
135 ItemGroupCollection
136 ZoneModelMngService::
137 getModelGroups(IZoneModel * model)
138 {
139  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_initialized),("Service used without initialization"));
140  ModelMap::iterator iModelZone = m_models.find(model->modelType());
141  if (iModelZone == m_models.end()) return ItemGroupCollection();
142  ModelZoneMap & modelZoneMap = iModelZone->second;
143  ModelZoneMap::iterator iGroupModel = modelZoneMap.find(model);
144  if (iGroupModel == modelZoneMap.end()) return ItemGroupCollection();
145  return iGroupModel->second;
146 }
147 
148 
149 IZoneModelMng::ModelTypeEnumerator
150 ZoneModelMngService::
151 getModelTypes()
152 {
153  return new ModelTypeEnumeratorImpl(m_models);
154 }
155 
156 IZoneModelMng::ModelEnumerator
157 ZoneModelMngService::
158 getModels(IZoneModel::ModelType model_type)
159 {
160  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_initialized),("Service used without initialization"));
161  ModelMap::iterator iModelZone = m_models.find(model_type);
162  if (iModelZone == m_models.end()) return new ModelEnumeratorImpl(m_models[IZoneModel::ModelType()]); // empty ModelMapZone
163  return new ModelEnumeratorImpl(iModelZone->second);
164 }
165 
166 IZoneModel *
167 ZoneModelMngService::
168 getSingletonModel(IZoneModel::ModelType model_type)
169 {
170  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_initialized),("Service used without initialization"));
171  ModelMap::iterator iModelZone = m_models.find(model_type);
172  if (iModelZone == m_models.end()) return NULL; // empty ModelMapZone
173  ModelZoneMap & zone_map = iModelZone->second;
174  if (zone_map.size() > 1)
175  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Non unique model requested");
176  if (zone_map.empty())
177  return NULL;
178  return zone_map.begin()->first;
179 }
180 
181 void
182 ZoneModelMngService::
183 invalidateModel(IZoneModel * model)
184 {
185  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_initialized),("Service used without initialization"));
186  throw NotImplementedException(A_FUNCINFO);
187 }
188 
189 void
190 ZoneModelMngService::
191 invalidateGroup(ItemGroup group)
192 {
193  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_initialized),("Service used without initialization"));
194  throw NotImplementedException(A_FUNCINFO);
195 }

200 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_ZONEMODELMNG(ZoneModelMng,ZoneModelMngService);
